hero.subtitle: We're getting married
hero.quote: We found love that feels like home.
hero.infoText: Join us as we celebrate our love and begin our journey together. We would be honored to have you with us on this special day.

ceremony.title: Ceremony
ceremony.description: A beautiful church surrounded by nature in Stuttgart, providing a warm and intimate setting for the wedding ceremony.

reception.title: Reception
reception.description: An elegant event palace with luxurious décor and a grand ballroom — the perfect place to celebrate the evening together.
